page.title: Notifications
page.description: Updates about your courses, orders, and account.
page.emptyDescription: You're all caught up — new notifications will show up here.

instructorApplicationApproved.title: Application approved
instructorApplicationApproved.body: Congratulations — your Instructor application has been approved.

instructorApplicationRejected.title: Application update
instructorApplicationRejected.body: Your Instructor application wasn't approved this time.

courseApproved.title: Course approved
courseApproved.body: Your course "{courseTitle}" has been approved and published.

courseRejected.title: Course changes requested
courseRejected.body: Your course "{courseTitle}" wasn't approved. Review and resubmit it.

orderPaid.title: Payment received
orderPaid.body: Your payment for order #{orderRef} was successful.

orderFailed.title: Payment failed
orderFailed.body: Your payment for order #{orderRef} couldn't be processed.

quizPassed.title: Quiz passed
quizPassed.body: You passed "{lessonTitle}" with a score of {score}%.

quizFailed.title: Quiz not passed
quizFailed.body: You scored {score}% on "{lessonTitle}" — you can try again.
